entries.original: Handle 429 rate limit responses in Usage API with exponential backoff (#1368)
entries.translated: Usage API에서 지수 백오프를 사용하여 429 속도 제한 응답 처리 (#1368)

entries.original: Fixed gemini worker interactive mode flag handling (#1362, #1367)

entries.original: Updated Korean Team CLI docs to align with omc team canonical route (#1361)

entries.original: Added manual workflow_dispatch triggers for PR workflows
entries.translated: PR 워크플로에 수동 workflow_dispatch 트리거 추가
